en: Look at him.
Look how nervous he is.
All right, here he goes.
Oh, my God, look at this.
There's a lot of people in that wedding, buddy.
This is not right.
This is not right.
What Sal doesn't know is the bride and groom are actually in on it. Yes.
ko: 살이 모르는 것은 신랑 신부가 사실 이걸 알고 있다는 거야. 맞아.

en: But the 300 strangers in the room are a different story.
ko: 하지만 방 안의 300명의 낯선 사람들은 전혀 모르는 이야기야. 이 결혼식을 망칠 거야.

en: Definitely not in on it. We're gonna ruin this wedding. Here he comes.
All right, buddy, next speech is all yours, pal. Cheers.
ko: 자, 친구, 다음 연설은 네 차례야. 건배.

en: Yeah! Yeah!
Here we go. Yes.
Hello, everyone.
Oh, my God. Here we go.
Here we go. I hate you guys.
Oh, you hate us?
I'm sorry. You hate us?
Crystal and Gary have always been
the most good people I've ever known.
They have always been there for me when I needed them.
ko: 그들은 내가 필요할 때 항상 내 곁에 있어 줬어.

en: They're like loyal dogs. They're like my dogs.
ko: 그들은 충성스러운 개 같아. 내 개 같아.
